subject: [PATCH v1 10/17] fuse: add struct fuse_entry2_out and helpers for extended entry replies

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a new extended entry reply struct, fuse_entry2_out, which carries a backing_id and statx attributes. This is necessary for setting up passthrough on inodes. The patch also includes helpers to process fuse_entry2_out for lookup, revalidate, and create operations. Additionally, the fuse_statx_to_attr function is moved earlier in the file to avoid forward declaring.
